form.formComment: Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 450m at Ballarat behind Paw Fable beaten 6 lengths (25.74). The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 450m at Ballarat behind Paw Fable beaten 6 lengths (25.74). The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Shifted out and collided turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at Ballarat. Form solid prior to that including a win at Bendigo three back. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at Ballarat. Form solid prior to that including a win at Bendigo three back. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.58. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 410m at Horsham at Grade 4/5 level. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 460m. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 460m. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just three days ago over 400m at this track by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just three days ago over 400m at this track by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.88) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.5 lengths second. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (25.88) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.5 lengths second. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Horsham, recording an exceptional 23.09 over the 410m journey. Has the ability and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (16.86) over 300m at Healesville. Drawn wide. Deserves respect.
